ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the provider's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the provider's address */,
  "address_line3" TEXT /* Third line of the provider's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the provider is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the provider is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the provider's location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the provider is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the provider */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the provider's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the provider's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the provider was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider associated with the hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_type" INTEGER /* Type of hospital (e.g., Acute Care) */,
  "ownership" INTEGER /* Ownership type of the hospital (e.g., Government, Private) */,
  "emergency_services" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the hospital provides emergency services */,
  "bed_count" INTEGER /* Number of beds available in the hospital */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of specialties */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the hospital */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Reference to the inspection report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_hospital_type FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_type") REFERENCES hospital_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_emergency_services FOREIGN KEY ("emergency_services") REFERENCES emergency_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_ownership FOREIGN KEY ("ownership") REFERENCES ownerships ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hospital type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownerships" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of ownership */,
  "ownership_name" TEXT /* Name of the ownership type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ownership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of emergency service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emergency service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, policymaker, public user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital whose information was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the hospital information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, service availability) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the feedback is about */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the patient (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the patient */,
  "anonymized" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the feedback is anonymized */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service the feedback is about (e.g., emergency, outpatient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_feedback_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_feedback_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)
